name_en: Top-tier original M12109 Grey Neverfull Bandouliere Inside Out BB Handbag. This season's rendition of a classic double-sided design, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The removable zip pouch can be used alone or hung externally. The detachable shoulder strap allows for crossbody wear, while the dazzling metal hardware adds refined details. Dimensions: 24 × 14 × 9 cm
